ward.discharge_placeholder: ⁇  Summary of discharge, follow-up instructions, final assessment...
ward.no_rx_plan: ⁇  No RX Plan prescribed for this patient.
plan.recovery_triad: ⁇  Risk of lethal triad (hypothermia + coagulopathy + acidosis) - aggressive prevention throughout.
plan.recovery_tbi: ⁇  TBI: {gcsCat} - neuro checks q1-2h. CT head upon arrival. Avoid secondary injury (keep SBP > 90, SpO2 > 94%).
plan.recovery_obstetric: ⁇  Obstetric: fetal monitoring upon arrival. maternal stabilization = fetal stabilization. OBGYN notification.
export.label: ⁇  Etiqueta
shift.name: ⁇  Name
plan.pediatric_alert: ⁇  All doses based on weight (PARAMweight kg)
plan.pregnant_alert: ⁇  Doxycycline contraindicated, left lateral positioning, foetal monitoring
region.head: ⁇  Head
bp.m_pack_wound: ⁇  Pack wound: hemostatic gauze (Combat Gauze), direct pressure 3 min minimum.
bp.m_txa_push: ⁇  TXA {dose} IV/ I over 10 min - DEADLINE {deadline}.
bp.a_npa: ⁇  NPA insertion: lubricate, insert right nostril. consider recovery position if unconscious without spinal concern.
bp.a_gcs_low: ⁇  GCS <= 8 - high aspiration risk. Protect airway. Consider advanced airway if resources allow.
bp.r_absent: ⁇  No breath sounds - confirm airway, initiate BVM ventilation.
bp.r_tension_repeat: ⁇  If no improvement: check opposite side. Repeat if air stops rushing.
bp.r_open_chest: ⁇  Open chest wound - ventilated chest seal preferred.
bp.r_open_chest_monitor: ⁇  Monitor for tension after sealing - may need to burp seal or convert to vented.
bp.c_severe: ⁇  Large-bore IV x2 or IO. LR 1L -- titrate to SBP 80-90 mmHg (permissive hypotension). STOP fluids if SBP > 90 in penetrating torso.
bp.h_prevent: ⁇  Prevent hypothermia: remove wet clothing, space blanket, insulate from the ground.
bp.u_amox_pregnant: ⁇ Amoxicillin 500mg PO q8h x7 days - penicillin allergy, but required in pregnancy (doxycycline contraindicated).
bp.u_doxycycline: ⁇  Doxycycline 100mg PO q12h x7 days-- penicillin allergy substitution.
bp.u_ketamine: ⁇  Ketamine {kIV}mg IV slow push (0.2mg/kg) OR {kIM}mg IM. Reassess q30min. Have midazolam 1-2mg IV for emergence.
bp.u_ondansetron: ⁇  Ondansetron {dose} IV/ODT PRN nausea (especially with ketamine).
bp.u_lateral: ⁇  left-lateral decubitus or left-hip wedge-- reduces aortocaval compression.
bp.drug_txa_regimen: ⁇  Dose IV over 10 min, then same dose over 8hr
bp.drug_ketamine_warning: ⁇  Eventual Emergence Reactions: Pre-medicate with midazolam 1mg IV if prolonged use.
bp.mon_vitals: ⁇  Vital (HR, SBP, RR, SpO2) every {freq} min.
bp.mon_dressings: ⁇  Dressing: reassess q5 min until hemostasis confirmed.
bp.mon_internal: ⁇  Monitoring for signs of internal hemorrhage (HR trend, SBP trend).
bp.mon_temp: ⁇  Temperature: reassess q30 min, prevent heat loss.
bp.mon_txa: ⁇  TXA maintenance infusion: complete 8hr bag by {deadline}.
bp.mon_decomp: ⁇  Post-decompression: reassess breath sounds q15min. Repeat if deteriorates.
bp.rx_txa: ⁇  ({n}) TXA {dose} IV over 10 min -- then the same dose over 8hr
bp.rx_oxytocin: ⁇  ({n}) Oxytocin 10U IM after placental delivery -- then 40U/1L IV infusion PRN
bp.rec_triad: ⁇  Risk of lethal triad (hypothermia + coagulopathy + acidosis) - aggressive prevention throughout.
bp.rec_tbi: ⁇  TBI: {gcsCat} - Neuro checks q1-2h. CT head upon arrival. Avoid secondary injury (keep SBP > 90, SpO2 > 94%).
bp.rec_obstetric: ⁇  Obstetric: fetal monitoring upon arrival. maternal stabilization = fetal stabilization. OBGYN notification.
bp.esc_sbp: ⁇  SBP drops below 80 mmHg despite controlled bleeding and fluids.
bp.esc_gcs: ⁇  GCS decreases > 2 points from initial assessment.
bp.esc_tq: ⁇  Tourniquet site shows renewed/ worsening bleeding.
bp.esc_decomp: ⁇  Post-decompression: recurrent respiratory distress - repeat needle or chest tube.
bp.esc_txa: ⁇  TXA not administered before {deadline} -- document, DO NOT give after window.
